notes: Fleet combat allies (slice 3). Your own warships can now fight alongside you. In a raid, call an idle warship into the fight as a loyal ally that takes NO loot cut — 100% callable, any target. In an escort, assign warships to your convoy for free; they never desert, and any damage they take (or a loss) carries back to your fleet when the run ends. Ships on a mission or escort can't be reassigned or scrapped until you bring them home. Build a navy and it finally fights at your side.
